name: aidlc
description: AIDLC Phase 1 (Inception) + Phase 2 (Construction) opt-in extensions for awslabs/aidlc-workflows. Inception covers workspace detection (greenfield vs brownfield), adaptive-depth requirements analysis, conditional user stories, and workflow planning. Construction covers component design, code generation with human-gated review, TDD-for-agentic test strategy, 12-category risk discovery, and phase quality gates. Contributes only skills and extension rules; does not re-implement aidlc-workflows core.
